name: 4.2-kiloyear event
sources_notes: 4.2 ka BP paleoclimate event; Akkadian Empire collapse + Egypt Old Kingdom collapse; Cullen et al. 2000

name: Late Bronze Age drought
sources_notes: Kaniewski et al.; coincides with Bronze Age collapse

name: Drought under Ahab (Elijah's drought)
sources_notes: 1 Kings 17-18; Menander of Ephesus (via Josephus); ~3 years per biblical account

name: Mayan terminal classic drought
sources_notes: Hodell et al.; multiple multi-decade dry phases; Classic Maya collapse

name: Medieval climate dry phase (SW US)
sources_notes: Tree-ring evidence; precursor to Anasazi/Pueblo distress

name: Great Drought (Anasazi)
sources_notes: Tree-ring evidence; Pueblo/Anasazi abandonment of Mesa Verde region

name: Central European drought
sources_notes: Pfister and Brazdil; extreme heat year 1540

name: Russian famine drought
sources_notes: Time of Troubles; volcanic Huaynaputina cooling 1600 contributed

name: Irish Bliain an Áir drought + frost
sources_notes: Different from 1845 famine; severe early-18th-C event

name: Bengal drought-famine
sources_notes: British East India Company era; Davis

name: Mt Tambora year-without-summer drought
sources_notes: Stommel; following 1815 eruption; affected Europe/India/North America

name: Irish Potato Famine (failure of monsoon)-
sources_notes: Kinealy; primary cause was potato blight not drought but drought year 1846 contributed

name: Great Famine drought (India/China/Brazil/Egypt)
sources_notes: Davis 2001; super El Niño 1877-78; one of worst climate events of human history

name: Soviet Volga drought
sources_notes: Patenaude; one of worst Russian famines

name: US Dust Bowl
sources_notes: Egan; displaced 2.5M from Great Plains; dust pneumonia mortality

name: Soviet Holodomor drought + policy
sources_notes: Conquest; policy-driven famine but coincided with drought

name: Bengal drought-famine
sources_notes: Sen; cyclone + drought + policy + war disruption

name: Great Chinese Famine drought + policy
sources_notes: Dikötter; deadliest famine in history; drought contributed

name: Southern African drought
sources_notes: Severe regional impact; few deaths due to aid

name: Australian Millennium Drought
sources_notes: Worst in instrumental record; Murray-Darling basin

name: Amazon drought
sources_notes: Marengo et al.; record low Rio Negro

name: Horn of Africa drought
sources_notes: WPF; five consecutive failed rainy seasons

name: European drought
sources_notes: Worst in 500 years per some metrics
